item.title: Infinite midwit 摘要
item.description:
The author reflects on AI's evolution, noting initial fears of omnipotence have given way to viewing AI as an 'infinite midwit'—knowledgeable but lacking true subjective intelligence. AI excels in objective tasks like calculations and grammar but fails in subjective areas like writing, where it produces technically correct but soulless content. The piece argues that objective intelligence (measurable, testable) and subjective intelligence (intuitive, creative) are distinct, and AI's dominance in the former doesn't translate to the latter, leaving a persistent gap in capabilities like meaningful writing and human-like understanding.
标签: AI, LLM, writing, subjective intelligence, objective intelligence, technology critique, human-AI interaction, creativity, psychology, artificial general intelligence

item.title: The Subprime AI Crisis Is Here 摘要
item.description:
The article draws parallels between the 2008 subprime mortgage crisis and current economic conditions, highlighting how adjustable-rate mortgages (ARMs) with teaser rates led to widespread defaults as rates reset higher. It debunks the myth that low-income borrowers were the primary cause, noting that middle and high-income households also heavily participated, driven by easy credit and flawed assumptions about perpetual housing price growth. The piece cites historical data, including denial rates for mortgages dropping and credit card debt rising, to illustrate how systemic overconfidence and misinformation fueled the bubble, with experts downplaying risks until the collapse.
标签: finance, housing-market, subprime-mortgage-crisis, economic-history, adjustable-rate-mortgages, credit-debt, financial-bubbles, risk-analysis, economic-policy, market-speculation

item.title: llm-echo 0.4 摘要
item.description:
The article announces the release of llm-echo version 0.4, a tool for interacting with language models. The key update in this release is that prompts now include populated 'input_tokens' and 'output_tokens' fields in the response, providing users with token usage metrics for better monitoring and cost management of LLM interactions.
标签: release, llm, tool, update, tokens, monitoring, cost, language-model, open-source, github

item.title: llm 0.30 摘要
item.description:
The llm 0.30 release introduces a new optional model_aliases parameter for the register_models() plugin hook, allowing plugins with @hookimpl(trylast=True) to consider previously registered models, async models, and aliases from other plugins. Additionally, public classes and methods now include docstrings that are directly incorporated into the documentation.
标签: llm, release, plugin, documentation, model-aliases, python, AI-tools, software-update

item.title: llm-all-models-async 0.1 摘要
item.description:
Simon Willison released llm-all-models-async 0.1, a plugin that converts sync LLM models to async models using a thread pool. This was developed to enable sync-only plugins like llm-mrchatterbox to work with Datasette features requiring async models, such as datasette-enrichments-llm. The plugin required a new hook mechanism in LLM 0.30, which was recently shipped.
标签: LLM, async, Python, plugin, Datasette, thread pool, model conversion, API, development, open source

item.title: datasette-llm 0.1a4 摘要
item.description:
datasette-llm 0.1a4 introduces the ability to configure different API keys for models based on their purpose, such as using a dedicated key for enrichments with a specific model like gpt-5.4-mini. This release also includes llm-echo 0.3, an API key testing utility developed for testing this new feature.
标签: datasette, llm, API keys, model configuration, enrichments, testing, release, open-source, tooling, AI integration

item.title: RAM Is the New Bearer Bond 摘要
item.description:
A Costco in Florida now removes memory chips from display computers to prevent theft, as criminal groups target RAM shipments due to a global shortage. This situation is likened to heist films like 'Die Hard' and 'Heat,' which focused on bearer bonds, now obsolete in digital finance, making RAM a modern high-value target for theft.
标签: RAM, theft, shortage, electronics, crime, supply chain, security, technology, business, trends

item.title: Updating Ubuntu packages that you have local changes for with dgit 摘要
item.description:
This article provides a practical guide for updating an Ubuntu package with local changes using dgit. The author details steps to safely integrate upstream updates while preserving custom modifications, including creating a backup branch, fetching updates with dgit, discarding the debian/changelog commit before rebasing, and regenerating the changelog. Key commands and troubleshooting tips are shared based on real experience, emphasizing repository management over source packages.
标签: Linux, Ubuntu, dgit, Git, package management, Debian, version control, system administration, open source, software development

item.title: Business Insider Profiles Fidji Simo, OpenAI’s ‘CEO of Applications’ 摘要
item.description:
Business Insider profiles Fidji Simo, OpenAI's 'CEO of Applications,' who oversees nearly two-thirds of the company. Simo describes having autonomy in her role, with Sam Altman deferring to her on matters he doesn't feel strongly about, while they debate others. As OpenAI approaches a potential IPO, Simo faces the challenge of making products profitable while reassuring staff that commercialization won't alter the research-driven mission. The company is projected to incur massive losses, with estimates ranging from $111 billion to $143 billion by 2030. Simo's background at Facebook, where she prioritized product revenue over quality, raises concerns about her approach at OpenAI, especially given the lack of network effects that protect social platforms like Facebook.
标签: OpenAI, leadership, Fidji Simo, CEO, business strategy, IPO, profitability, AI industry, corporate governance, Facebook

item.title: My ramblings are available over gopher 摘要
item.description:
The author criticizes the complexity of modern web protocols and advocates for Gopher as a simpler alternative. They explain Gopher's menu-based navigation, where links are plain text files with metadata stored in tab-separated lines, contrasting it with HTTP and Gemini. The author argues that Gopher's simplicity avoids the distractions of inline links and that Gemini is an unnecessary reinvention of HTTP without significant benefits. They highlight Gopher's historical interest and compatibility with tools like Lynx, while dismissing Gemini as a solution to emotional rather than technical problems.
标签: web, protocols, gopher, simplicity, historical, navigation, HTTP, Gemini, text-based, links
